mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) FROM `group` g INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON g.id = ucl.class_id INNER JOIN teacher t ON ucl.user_id = t.user_id WHERE t.id = #{teacherId} AND ucl.type = 2
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) FROM student s INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON s.class_id = ucl.class_id INNER JOIN teacher t ON ucl.user_id = t.user_id WHERE t.id = #{teacherId} AND ucl.type = 2
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) FROM textbook t WHERE t.textbook_author_id = #{teacherId} AND t.release_status = 1

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM course c INNER JOIN course_class_list ccl ON c.id = ccl.course_id INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON ccl.class_id = ucl.class_id INNER JOIN teacher t ON ucl.user_id = t.user_id WHERE t.id = #{teacherId} AND ucl.type = 2
SELECT user_id FROM user_class_list WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND type = 1
SELECT s.id, s.name, s.identity_id FROM student s INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON s.user_id = ucl.user_id WHERE ucl.class_id = #{classId} AND ucl.type = 1

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ll.reading_duration), 0) as total_reading_time FROM learning_log ll INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON ll.creator = ucl.user_id WHERE ucl.class_id = #{classId} AND ucl.type = 1 AND ll.add_datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ll.textbook_id) as total_reading_num FROM learning_log ll INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON ll.creator = ucl.user_id WHERE ucl.class_id = #{classId} AND ucl.type = 1 AND ll.add_datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_notes_num FROM learning_notes ln INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON ln.creator = ucl.user_id WHERE ucl.class_id = #{classId} AND ucl.type = 1 AND ln.add_datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tqb.id) as total_question_bank_num FROM teaching_question_bank tqb INNER JOIN student_exercises_record ser ON tqb.id = ser.teaching_question_bank_id INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON ser.student_id = ucl.user_id WHERE ucl.class_id = #{classId} AND ucl.type = 1 AND ser.add_datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_communication_feedback_num FROM discussion_topic_reply dtr INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON dtr.creator = ucl.user_id WHERE ucl.class_id = #{classId} AND ucl.type = 1 AND dtr.add_datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT t.id as textbookId, t.textbook_name as textbookName, COALESCE(reader_stats.reader_count, 0) as readerCount, COALESCE(reading_stats.reading_duration_minutes, 0) as readingDurationMinutes, COALESCE(activity_stats.teaching_activity_count, 0) as teachingActivityCount, COALESCE(feedback_stats.communication_feedback_count, 0) as communicationFeedbackCount, ( COALESCE(reader_stats.reader_count, 0) * 10 + COALESCE(reading_stats.reading_duration_minutes, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(activity_stats.teaching_activity_count, 0) * 5 + COALESCE(feedback_stats.communication_feedback_count, 0) * 3 ) as popularityScore FROM textbook t LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计阅读人数 SELECT ll.textbook_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ll.creator) as reader_count FROM learning_log ll WHERE ll.data_type = 0 GROUP BY ll.textbook_id ) reader_stats ON t.id = reader_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计阅读时长（基于时间间隔算法） SELECT ll1.textbook_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ll2.add_datetime::timestamp) - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ll1.add_datetime::timestamp) BETWEEN 55 AND 65 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) as reading_duration_minutes FROM learning_log ll1 LEFT JOIN learning_log ll2 ON ll1.creator = ll2.creator AND ll1.textbook_id = ll2.textbook_id AND ll2.add_datetime > ll1.add_datetime AND ll2.id = ( SELECT id FROM learning_log WHERE creator = ll1.creator AND textbook_id = ll1.textbook_id AND add_datetime > ll1.add_datetime ORDER BY add_datetime ASC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE ll1.data_type = 0 GROUP BY ll1.textbook_id ) reading_stats ON t.id = reading_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计教学活动数量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as teaching_activity_count FROM discussion_topic dt GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) activity_stats ON t.id = activity_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计交流反馈数量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(dtr.id) as communication_feedback_count FROM discussion_topic dt LEFT JOIN discussion_topic_reply dtr ON dt.id = dtr.topic_id GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) feedback_stats ON t.id = feedback_stats.textbook_id WHERE t.textbook_author_id = #{teacherId} AND t.release_status = 1 ORDER BY popularityScore DESC LIMIT 10
